trigger: 新婚之夜在婚房内，面对冷淡的妻子

appearance_delta.face: 如玉面庞，眼神复杂矛盾
appearance_delta.body: 长身玉立，姿态略显僵硬
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 琥珀色眸子中透出不甘与困惑

visual_reference: handsome Chinese groom in red wedding robes with gold embroidery, jade-like cold features, amber eyes showing conflict and frustration, traditional wedding headpiece, ancient China wedding night, red candles background, elegant but tense posture
